# @lumiarq/pack-nextjs

Framework pack for Next.js projects.

## What it does

- Provides Next.js adapter and pack manifest
- Supplies framework-specific detection and generation behavior

## Install

```bash
pnpm add @lumiarq/pack-nextjs
```

## Contributing

1. Validate output against modern Next.js app structures.
2. Add tests when routing or template behavior changes.
3. Run `pnpm --filter @lumiarq/pack-nextjs test typecheck build`.
